name: SD-WAN Pro
short_description: Managed multi-site SD-WAN with policy-based routing and centralized control.
key_benefits: 20-40% latency reduction compared to legacy MPLS
Built-in failover and application-aware traffic shaping

name: 5G Private Network
short_description: Dedicated 5G coverage for industrial and high-density sites.
key_benefits: Deterministic low-latency wireless for OT and AGVs
Edge compute co-located with the radio core
Spectrum and SIM lifecycle fully managed

name: Managed Cloud Connect
short_description: Direct private link to major public clouds with managed routing and egress.
key_benefits: Private connectivity to AWS, Azure and GCP
Reduced cloud egress costs vs public internet transit
End-to-end SLA across the link and the underlay

name: IoT Fleet Connectivity
short_description: Multi-region SIM management and connectivity for IoT and vehicle fleets.
key_benefits: Single pane for SIM provisioning, billing and policy
Global roaming with deterministic per-region rates

name: UC Suite Pro
short_description: Cloud telephony, video and contact-centre features in one subscription.
key_benefits: BYOD-friendly softphone and HD video conferencing
Native integrations with major CRMs and helpdesks
